tool_purpose: This API allows you to generate embeddings for audio files using a pre-trained YAMNet model from TensorFlow Hub. The embeddings can be used for various tasks such as audio classification, similarity search, and more. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Generate embeddings for audio files. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/google/yamnet/1').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
doc_snippets: This API allows you to generate embeddings for audio files using a pre-trained YAMNet model from TensorFlow Hub. The embeddings can be used for various tasks such as audio classification, similarity search, and more. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Generate embeddings for audio files. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/google/yamnet/1').
